Iran blows up a building, while the US blows up a regime.

Iran has blown up a CIA station at the US Embassy in Saudi Arabia as the agency works to arm militants for an uprising against the Islamic regime. A suspected Iranian drone struck the CIA station in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia's capital, on Monday, just two days after the spy agency pinpointed Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's location in the strike that killed him. An internal State Department alert revealed that Tehran's attack 'collapsed' part of the station's roof and 'contaminated' the compound with smoke, according to the Washington Post .

Rachel from accounts is toast

Rachel Reeves, in powder blue, sashayed in one pace behind the most disliked prime minister in memory. Her own approval ratings are at Buster Crabbe depths. The economy? Whiffy as a slice of Ross-shire Minger. Not that you would have guessed that from her catwalk gait. She flicked her head to aerate a newly frou-frou'd barnet (a feathered lob). Fruity self-pleasure curled on her lips. She spotted friends in the gallery and coo-eed. Beside her sat Sir Keir, ghostly and scraped-back, the walking corpse. Other Cabinet ministers included scary Bridget Phillipson, the usual hive of scowls, and the Treasury's James Murray, mortuary attendant manque. Transport Secretary Heidi Alexander rubbed a tired face. Deputy PM David Lammy massaged a stiff knee. But Ms Reeves, despite a cold, thought everything fabuloso. Beforehand, behind the Speaker's chair, she had looked expressionless but once she stepped front-of-house she went all spangly. TV cameras do this to her. She adores the attention.
  • 7 comments
  • 1 video

Police officer lay down in sun and took selfies while on duty guarding murder investigation scene after teenage boy stabbed to death, jury hears

A police officer took selfies while on duty guarding a murder scene following the fatal stabbing of a teenage boy, a court heard today. PC Ryan Connolly, 41, took pictures of himself - including one where he was lying down in the summer sunshine - while manning a cordon, a jury was told. The Merseyside Police officer had been tasked with securing the scene in Liverpool on July 3, 2018 following the killing of Daniel Gee-Jamieson, 16.
  • share Police officer 'took selfies while on duty guarding scene of killing'

I saw a very large deep dark blood orange low on the horizon then later when it rose still quite large but a dark golden yellow. Amazingly beautiful.

Most visible from Scotland, Northern Ireland and northern England, the second full moon of the year and the first of spring will be less clear in the cloudier south. Earlier on Tuesday the moon appeared red as it coincided with a 'blood moon', or a full lunar eclipse, which takes on a red colour as it lines up with the Earth and the sun.

'70s pinup Mariel Hemingway, 64, who played a Playboy bunny and co-starred with Woody Allen, shares brutally honest post about aging

Mariel Hemingway was a blonde pinup beauty in the 1970s and 1980s. The granddaughter of The Sun Also Rises novelist Ernest Hemingway was a model in New York City for top fashion magazines such as Vogue and Cosmopolitan. She then parlayed that fame into a starring role in the Woody Allen doomed romance drama Manhattan in 1979.
